children.heading: Trade
children.label: a Trade
children.text: This subchapter shall be applied in a manner consistent with United States obligations under international agreements.
affects the authority of the Secretary of Health and Human Services or creates any rights or obligations for any person under the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act ( et seq.); or21 U.S.C. 301
affects the authority of the Secretary of the Treasury or creates any rights or obligations for any person under the Federal Alcohol Administration Act ( et seq.).27 U.S.C. 201

children.heading: Other
children.label: c Other
children.text: A food may not be considered to be “not bioengineered”, “non-GMO”, or any other similar claim describing the absence of bioengineering in the food solely because the food is not required to bear a disclosure that the food is bioengineered under this subchapter.
